causality_audit.finding: EXP-007A computes rolling evidence causally, then averages it across the complete trajectory before fitting and inference; the resulting intervention score is not available at the earlier prediction times to which it is applied.

development_design.held_out_unit: complete_trajectory across all candidates and prefixes
development_design.per_outer_fold: 48 fit trajectories, 16 threshold-calibration trajectories, 16 held-out trajectories

opened_test_role: exploratory stress audit only; not confirmation and not used for method selection

methodology_references.title: Conformal Risk Control
methodology_references.use: risk-control framing and explicit abstention conservativeness
methodology_references.claim_excluded: No conformal guarantee is claimed for this diagnostic selector.
